params.context: Batch F-19: daglo probe (Phase 1 URL discovery + accessibility check). Speech-to-Text (STT) AI service. APF NOT YET REGISTERED. Note: text prompt may not be primary input mode — daglo is audio-driven (upload audio → transcript). For Phase 1, just identify URL accessibility + UI pattern (audio upload vs text chat).

devtools_check_instructions: 1. Try URLs in order — first reachable wins
3. Anonymous mode 시도, 로그인 강제 시 report
4. If accessible: characterize UI (audio upload form, text chat, both?)
5. If text input available: try the prompt + capture; if audio-only: report as such for separate handling design
6. Capture (a) confirmed URL, (b) UI mode, (c) any visible API endpoints

notes: Batch F-19 daglo Phase 1 probe — STT AI, may need audio-handler not text-handler.
